extra.reason: Scaffold complete: cdylib builds, exports all wbcffi_* symbols, links gtk-3/epoxy, clippy+fmt clean

Offscreen software render harness delivered: examples/render_tile.rs renders the tile via surfaceless EGL+femtovg to PNG (validated at t=0.6/2.0/7.5s, animated gradient + multiline text). Live-waybar harness defused (removed pkill niri) and marked DANGER.
Implemented + validated in real waybar; 8 unit tests, clippy/fmt clean.
Implemented + vision-validated in real waybar. 22 unit tests, clippy/fmt clean. Effect seam proven (<box>); shaders/glow are the documented next step.
Implemented + vision-validated (offscreen dashboard + live waybar). 24 unit tests, clippy/fmt clean.
Implemented + vision-validated (offscreen frame + live waybar). 25 unit tests, clippy/fmt clean.
Implemented + vision-validated (offscreen low/high + live waybar). 26 unit tests, clippy/fmt clean.
Implemented + vision-validated (offscreen + live waybar conditional glow). 26 unit tests, clippy/fmt clean.
Fixed + verified via the now-faithful headless harness (femtovg+glow renders clean).
Implemented + vision-verified headless (scroll, clip, seamless loop, marker). 27 unit tests, clippy/fmt clean.
Inline-composable ticker; verified headless (label + ticker box + value on one line). 27 tests, clippy/fmt clean.

Generalized draw_inline->draw_flow: multi-line composition via pure flow_layout() splitter (text runs + embed refs in document order). 5 new unit tests. Vision-verified 2-line claude tile at 300x50; single-line ticker demo no-regression.

Added <status> inline element + draw_status (working orange-blink / shell cyan-pulse / prompt yellow-? blink / idle 7-level fade cells). Broadened frame-clock trigger to <status. Vision-verified all 4 states distinct + blink across frames.

type Config=serde_json::Value; config::resolve layers bundled/file preset under module keys via recursive merge(). src/tiles registry (include_str! presets). 7 new tests (merge/resolve/registry). Build+42 tests green.

Bundled claude tile authored: tiles/claude/{tile.json (300x50, multi-line template),schema.json (draft-07, mock-vs-real annotated),samples/{working,prompt,idle,shell}.json,README.md}. Main README section added. Vision-verified all 4 states via the real preset path (pwetty render): correct shortcuts, distinct indicators, ↑N badge hidden when 0, looping marquee.

src/bin/pwetty.rs: list/schema/check/render. check cross-checks template undeclared_variables vs schema properties + renders every sample. render uses new pub render_png (shared with examples). cairo png feature promoted to normal dep. Verified: list/check(exit0)/render --all-states all work.

All 5 children done: packaging(3te), multi-line flow(x2f), <status>(dha), claude tile+schema+docs(0ne), pwetty CLI(gyt). Bundled claude tile renders 4 states; data decoupled via JSON Schema + pwetty check/schema/render. 42 tests, clippy/fmt clean.
Raised indicator alpha floors (working 0.18→0.45, shell 0.40→0.55), dot radius 0.26→0.30; ↑N badge bold; title brightened #a6adc8→#cdd6f4. Vision-verified.

Composable <pulse> wrapper (markup PULSE_TAG + Processed.pulse) → whole-tile push_group+paint_with_alpha(osc, floor 0.40). claude template wraps content in <pulse> when state=='prompt'; ? now bright static #f9e2af (no double-osc). Verified: number+folder+title+? all dim together across bright/dim frames.
draw_ticker renders static (left-aligned, no ◆) when text fits the box; TICKER_SPEED 120→70. Verified short title identical across frames.
Loop period = unit width + 1.25× box width, so the box fully clears between passes (◆ exits, blank beat, then restart).
Preset width 300→240, tickerbox 270→210. Re-vision-checked 2-line layout at 240×50.
All 5 feedback items done + vision-verified; 42 tests, clippy/fmt clean. Re-demoed.
glow_halo(): Cairo radial bloom behind the prompt ? (radius 0.95×slot, yellow #f9e2af, inside the pulse group). Vision-verified visible.
Added idle_ago (string) to schema+samples; template renders '{{ idle_ago }} ago' (small grey) on line 1 when state=idle. Verified '12m ago'.
font_size 13→15; dot radius →0.42, idle cell height →0.62, ? glyph →0.92×slot — symbols now read at the number's scale, all bigger. Verified.
↑N moved off line 1 into the line-2 tickerbox, prefixing the title (bold green). Line 1 declutters for the bigger symbol+number+folder. Verified.
All 4 round-2 items done + vision-verified; 42 tests, clippy/fmt clean. Re-demoed.
Shared-baseline two-pass layout in draw_flow; symbols centered on text optical centre. Vision-checked working/prompt/idle/shell + regression on the icon+ticker+value line. 42 tests, clippy/fmt clean.
Number xx-large; symbol follows via ink-box match; text ink-centered (not baseline). Dot optical bump 0.5→0.58·cap. Vision-verified at 3x + normal.
font_family config option added + threaded; claude preset uses Terminus. Verified rendering.
working #d97757→#ff6a2c, shell #5ccfe6→#15d1e6 — saturated/punchy. Vision-verified.

src/svg.rs rasterize_argb32 (resvg/tiny-skia → premultiplied BGRA, fit+center, optional tint mask); paint_argb32_at composite; thread_local ICON_CACHE keyed by (source,px,tint); device scale threaded into draw_flow. Builds, no warnings.
icons/ dir + svg::BUNDLED registry (include_str!): folder/check/arrow-up/bell/code/terminal/gear/app. Lookup by name; src= for files.
<icon name|src color> inline embed; sized to neighbour digit ink (skips empty-ink runs, falls back to line cap), centered on mid-line. Gallery of 8 tinted icons + digit alignment vision-verified.

claude tile {% if is_claude %} branch: non-claude shows shortcut + app icon (<icon src/name>, path-or-bundled via '/' in app_icon) + app label + title marquee. Added is_claude/app/app_icon to schema + window.json sample. check green; window tile vision-verified.

README 'Icons (bundled SVGs)' section (<icon name/src/color>, bundled set list + docs/icons.png gallery); improved gear icon to a real cog; tiles/claude/README contract updated with idle_ago/is_claude/app/app_icon + the two-layout explanation.
SVG icons done: resvg plumbing+cache, bundled set, <icon> embed, app-icon variant, docs. NOT redoing Cairo status (per scope). 42 tests, clippy/fmt clean, check green.
working 1.1s/0.45→1.7s/0.15, shell 1.6s/0.55→2.2s/0.25 — slower, deep fade. Verified bright vs dim frames.
working 1.7→2.0s, shell 2.2→2.8s, prompt pulse 1.0→1.3s; orange #ff6a2c→#ff5a14, cyan #15d1e6→#00d3ee. Built, gates green.
shell→#12f5ff electric; moderate color-matched glow under working+shell dots, pulsing with the dot. Verified.

Active-desktop differentiation: <active/> marker → Processed.active → draw_active_panel (accent fill+border 'card') behind the tile (steady, outside the pulse group). 'active' field in claude+empty schemas; working sample active=true. Vision-verified (border on active, none on inactive).

Compact 'empty' bundled preset (56px, align=center): shortcut stacked over a dim hollow <status state=empty> ring. Added config.align + center support in draw_flow (per-line total advance). Fixed a cross-cutting Cairo bug: arc helpers (dot/ring/glow) now new_sub_path() so no stray connector line. Vision-verified.
working glow alpha a*0.35→a*0.5, radius cap_h*0.95→1.1. Verified.

Throttle frame-clock redraw to target fps (DEFAULT_ANIM_FPS=20, or config.fps) instead of 60Hz; skip per-frame femtovg GPU render+readback for content tiles w/o shader (static bg filled in Cairo). Big CPU/GPU reduction.

schema required=[shortcut] + allOf if/then/else (window→app_icon/app, claude→state) — fixes the window sample violating its own required; added 'pwetty render --data <file|->' so the data agent renders its OWN json (verified with a real freedesktop firefox.svg); README + contract docs updated.
glow 0.85→0.55, glyph #f9e2af→#ffd42a. Verified.
icon_size attr + icon-forward single-line window layout; verified firefox/kitty render big+crisp.

draw_flow detects a leading <icon hero>, draws it as a full-height left gutter, indents lines past it. Window template leads with hero icon; shortcut+app line1, title marquee line2. Verified firefox/kitty; claude tiles unchanged.
<sep/> run-splitter; shortcut/app now independently ink-centered. Verified at 3x.
claude-face bundled SVG; working=orange face, shell=cyan face, tinted+blinking+glow. Verified.
draw_glyph_centered now centers on text::ink_extent (true rendered ink) instead of Pango pixel_extents — matches the digit's metric. Measuring to confirm.
Implemented in a5a5fd9: ContentStore tracks animating; idle/empty/wrapped tiles don't repaint.
Done this session; gates green (43 tests, clippy, pwetty check claude).

Implemented stream:true push mode in content.rs (spawn-once + BufReader lines + set per line; EOF keeps last content, respawns after 1s backoff; blank lines skipped). Unconditional 150ms dirty poll repaints; no lib.rs change. Docs + 2 tests added. Gates green (45 tests, clippy, pwetty check).
Done; gates green (45 tests, clippy, pwetty check).
Implemented + gated (48 tests, clippy, fmt).
Generalized draw_flow gutter to accept a big-text element (<gutter>); builds clean.
claude2 preset shipped with schema/samples/README (README covers the ~78px bar-height guidance). Gates green.
claude2 preset shipped with schema/samples/README (README covers the ~78px bar-height guidance). Gates green.

Full antithesis-research pass complete: sut-analysis, existing-assertions (both repos scanned, zero instrumentation), 51-property catalog (41 discovery + 10 gap-fill; 4-lens evaluation + fresh-context self-review applied), deployment-topology (single-container, sway-outer hotplug option, 4 SUT-side seams), property-relationships (10 clusters), evaluation/synthesis. Artifacts in antithesis/scratchbook/ on branch worktree-antithesis-research.
Merged worktree-fix-gl-teardown-crash (30100f9) into antithesis-findings-fixes; 53/53 tests pass incl. engine_drop_without_current_context.
Fixed: ContentStore shutdown flag + child-pid kill; PwettyBox Drop calls shutdown(); dirty-poll timer checks shutdown and breaks. Commit 48cf74c.
Fixed: reader kills child before wait() on any loop exit, unblocking the decode-error/quiet-producer stall. Commit 48cf74c.
Fixed: capped read_until at 64KiB (LINE_CAP), over-cap unterminated line treated as decode error. Commit 48cf74c.
Fixed: ensure_target returns bool, GL creation failure degrades to transparent frame with one-shot log instead of unwrap panic. Commit 48cf74c.
Fixed: read_icon_src guards fs::metadata (regular file, <=1MiB) before fs::read. Commit 48cf74c.

Fixed in agentic-db (separate repo, branch fix-tile-watch-placeholder-demotion, commit b0751da): RunWatch keeps last state on cache read error instead of demoting to placeholder; decision logic extracted to nextWatchLine, 5-case table test added.
